name: PIXELWORKS, INC
summary: Pixelworks, Inc. provides content creation, video delivery, and display processing solutions enabling authentic viewing experiences across screens from cinema to smartphone. Following the January 2026 sale of its semiconductor subsidiary PWSH, the company focuses exclusively on its TrueCut Motion platform, offering motion grading software tools, certification services, and IP licensing for cinematic visualization solutions to filmmakers, display makers, and streaming services.

products.name: TrueCut Motion Platform
products.description: Content creation and motion grading platform enabling filmmakers to customize motion look, preserve creative intent across screens, and certify display playback.

products.name: TrueCut Motion Content Creation Software Tools
products.description: Software tools providing filmmakers the ability to customize motion look on a shot-by-shot basis.

products.name: TrueCut Motion Certification Services
products.description: Certification, support, and IP licensing services for display makers to enable TrueCut Motion content playback and brand usage.

partnerships.description: Samsung mentioned as a television manufacturer relevant to TrueCut Motion display certification and licensing context.
TCL mentioned as a television manufacturer relevant to TrueCut Motion display certification and licensing context.
